paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 113 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 56 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 26 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 1 task should be active but is stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 60 days past due with 43 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **21 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 39 days past due with 27 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **23 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 7 payment tasks due this week.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 27 days past due with 17 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **9 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $44,175 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 10 days past due with 8 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **80 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $654,922 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 10 days past due with 6 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **23 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 11 days past due with 5 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **11 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** The oldest overdue task is 8 days past due with 4 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **9 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 3 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **7 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $25,531 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

234 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **183 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 29 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$686,734 in payments going out this week** across 29 tasks — make sure funds are available. $56,431 expected in from 3 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) and Stephanie and Marc Felton — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 8. Keep the momentum going.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 6 overdue (oldest: 10d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **23 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 32 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 4 overdue (oldest: 8d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **9 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 19 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 3 overdue — oldest first. **7 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 16 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 3. Keep the momentum going.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 43 overdue (oldest: 60d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **21 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 21 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 27 overdue (oldest: 39d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **23 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 32 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 3 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 9. Keep the momentum going.

**Ginger Brown:** 17 overdue (oldest: 27d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **9 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 23 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 8 overdue (oldest: 10d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **80 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 80 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 5 overdue (oldest: 11d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **11 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 11 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
